title: Background
description: Character background (2024 rules). Grants three ability-score increases, one Origin feat, two skill proficiencies, one tool proficiency, and an equipment-or-gold package. Clean-room mechanical facts only — no flavor prose (lore facts, if captured, go in the namespaced stage4_stub blob per stages-1-3-plan.md §3.10). See docs/srd/srd-coverage-audit.md §1.

id.description: Stable id; bg_ prefix + lowercase snake_case (e.g. bg_soldier).

ability_scores.description: The three ability scores this background can raise. 2024 rule: increase one by 2 and another by 1, OR increase all three by 1 (none above 20). The specific allocation is a per-PC choice resolved at build time (engine/creation.py, WS-A6).

increase_rule.description: RAW 2024 allocation rule; fixed for SRD backgrounds.

feat.description: Origin feat id granted by this background (resolves to a feat with category=origin).

skill_proficiencies.description: Skill names granted (RAW: exactly two). Lowercase skill names, e.g. ['athletics', 'intimidation'].

tool_proficiency.description: One tool proficiency: either a specific tool (string, e.g. 'thieves_tools') or a category the PC chooses from at build time.

equipment.description: The 2024 'Choose A or B' starting package: an equipment bundle (option A) versus a flat gold amount (option B, typically 50 GP). Each option lists item refs (eq_* ids or plain item names for unmodeled gear) and a gold amount.

aliases.description: Alternate internal names for content resolution (WS-I import matching).

public_name.description: PI-safe public display name override (WS-I rename layer, plan §3.8). Keyed off `source`; non-SRD entities ship under this name in the public bundle.

stage4_stub.description: Namespaced Stage-4 extension blob (plan §3.10): non-combat lore facts (personality traits / ideals / bonds / flaws references, background hooks). No engine semantics; never dropped, never wired. Speculative data only.
